description: Site-wide global navigation block containing a multi-level menu with top-level sections: Study, Research, Collaborate, and About.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Global navigation as it appears on every page of the university website — no configurable props, all content is hardcoded.

notes: This component has no props. The entire nav tree is identical across all 26,000+ pages sampled — textVaries: false on every sample. The content should be hardcoded in JSX. The root div also carries ids block-globalnav and classes block, block-fixed-block-content, block-globalnav. The inner nav element has class block-uos-globalnav, role=navigation, and aria-label='Global menu'. The menu is a nested ul structure three levels deep. Top-level items are: Study, Research, Collaborate, About. Items without an href (Study, Research, Collaborate, About, and 'Fees and funding') are plain text li nodes, not anchors. Some links carry a class uoslink. data-entity-type, data-entity-uuid, data-entity-substitution, and title attributes on anchors are CMS metadata and should be omitted.
htmlExamples:
• Study
    • Courses
  • Research
    • Research at Sheffield
  • Collaborate
    • Partnerships
  • About
    • About the University
